options.name: --input-assembly
options.description:
Required. Path to the assembly that
contains the types which should be
transpiled.

options.name: --include-referenced-assemblies
options.description:
Set this flag to enable transpilation
of root types declared in referenced
assemblies.

options.name: --platform
options.description:
(Default: System.Text.Json) Target
platform for the code transpilation,
will output different type/valued
conversions depending on the target
platform.

options.name: --output-directory
options.description: Required. Path to the output directory.
